tweets.text:
We're live on Product Hunt 🔥

Most AI presentation tools spent the last year solving how to generate a deck in 30 seconds. We spent it on how to generate one that doesn’t look like AI made it.

The reason AI decks look like AI decks is that the model has no idea what your decks usually look like. So it averages the internet. Pitch Agent reads your template first, the way a good coding agent reads your codebase before writing new code.

If you’ve been following along with our launch this week, or our product development over the last 8+ years, we’d love your support today.

Find us on Product Hunt: https://t.co/JbGn1jMBO2

profile_bio.description:
Win more deals. Pitch.

Contact support: https://t.co/xnHoEsADBS

tweets.text:
Pitch Agent is now live ✨

AI built into Pitch’s presentation workspace. Generate full decks from a prompt (using your team’s actual brand template), edit through chat, and draft follow-up emails when you’re done.

Not generic AI slides. On-brand, AI-powered work across the presentation lifecycle.

Try Pitch Agent today: https://t.co/UH2CnIZ5YU

tweets.text:
We're live on Product Hunt 🔥

Most AI presentation tools spent the last year solving how to generate a deck in 30 seconds. We spent it on how to generate one that doesn’t look like AI made it.

The reason AI decks look like AI decks is that the model has no idea what your decks usually look like. So it averages the internet. Pitch Agent reads your template first, the way a good coding agent reads your codebase before writing new code.

If you’ve been following along with our launch this week, or our product development over the last 8+ years, we’d love your support today.

Find us on Product Hunt: https://t.co/JbGn1jMBO2
